title: Cyclist Track Days 2026 bikes: Trek Madone
content:
Cyclist
Cyclist Track Days 2026 bikes: Trek Madone

The clock is ticking. There’s only a week and a half to go until the first Cyclist Track Days of 2026 at London’s Lee Valley VeloPark. To count down to the biggest of all days, we’re running through the bikes you’ll be able to test ride around the smooth, closed road circuit.

Next up in the list is the Trek Madone, which is exclusive to the London Track Days courtesy of Balfe’s Bikes.

The eighth generation Madone, as seen raced by the Lidl-Trek teams, combined the previous aero Madone and the lightweight Émonda into one all-round racing bike. When Cyclist editor Pete Muir reviewed it back in 2024, he described it as ‘fast and comfortable at the rear, but race bike stiff at the front’. Read his full review here.

For more information on Cyclist Track Days and to buy your tickets click here.

The Condor Super Acciaio Disc will be at the following Cyclist Track Days events:

Saturday 9th May 2026, Lee Valley VeloPark, London

Sunday 10th May 2026, Lee Valley VeloPark, London

BOOK YOUR TICKET HERE
